name: Shafu, the Wheeled Mayakashi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>轍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>わだち</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔妖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>まやかし</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>俥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しゃ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>夫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ふ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Mayakashi" monster in your GY, except "Shafu, the Wheeled Mayakashi"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Shafu, the Wheeled Mayakashi" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except "Mayakashi" monsters.
mnst_eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Mayakashi" monster in your GY, except "Shafu, the Wheeled Mayakashi"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Shafu, the Wheeled Mayakashi" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except "Mayakashi" monsters.
eff: If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can target 1 "Mayakashi" monster in your GY, except "Shafu, the Wheeled Mayakashi"; Special Summon it in Defense Position, but negate its effects. You can only use this effect of "Shafu, the Wheeled Mayakashi" once per turn. You cannot Special Summon monsters from the Extra Deck, except "Mayakashi" monsters.

mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons from the Extra Deck
Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
